amendatorysection.catchline: Workplace Safety Consultation Program Cash Fund; created; termination.
amendatorysection.para: There is hereby created the Workplace Safety Consultation Program Cash Fund. The fund terminates on July 18, 2026, and the State Treasurer shall transfer any money in the fund on such date to the General Fund.

crossreference.para: Nebraska Capital Expansion Act, see section 72-1269.
Nebraska State Funds Investment Act, see section 72-1260.
